name: Ada
known_facts: Field commander / scapegoat.
Listed KIA before final blast confirmation.
One of four Cape Wipeout survivors (with Tallai, Q, and Quartz).
Named in the refined Nago plate's in-world Honor & Origin line as one of those who carried Nago.
Full credited name per the Friedmandostorp rescue animatic: Adanna "Ada" Venter.

Carries a necklace from Kassey — a simple silver chain with a small, solid heart pendant (Kemi, 2026-06-23). Kassey (KC) is confirmed the same entity as the animatic's "Kassey", the canonical spelling (visual source of truth).
Kassey is Ada's lover — a man, a separate person (Kemi, 2026-06-23). His name burns across Ada's torn military record in the animatic. See 02_characters/KASSEY_DOSSIER.md.

Sent by the Military Industrial Complex (MIC), with Kassey, to execute the Cape Wipeout blast that obliterates the facility (Kemi, 2026-06-23). Elaborates her locked field-commander/scapegoat role and the locked fact that the MIC destroys the facility.
Appearance (Kemi, 2026-06-23): Nigerian; slim build. Long hair, default look slicked back in a ponytail; mangled in the blast (the animatic's 'A face first' beat). Other features open.
Wears a military uniform — 'medium brass' (Kemi, 2026-06-23), read in the standard military sense as a mid-ranking officer, fitting her field-commander role.
Personality (Kemi, 2026-06-23): under pressure, when things are coming apart, she goes cold and methodical, not loud. Voice and personality otherwise open.

Locked visual reference (Kemi-approved, 2026-06-23): assets/concept-art/ADA_CHARACTER_REFERENCE_v1.png. Locks the 'medium brass' gloss to a woodland-pattern camo uniform with a name tape ('ADA'), gold collar rank insignia, a wings/pilot-style chest badge, a sleeve flag patch (design unspecified), a web belt with holstered sidearm and knife, and a wristwatch. See 13_fragments/2026-06-23_ada_reference_portrait.md.

Four additional locked reference images (Kemi-approved, 2026-06-23, 'Lock all five'): assets/concept-art/ADA_WASTELAND_REFERENCE_v1.png (blast-wreckage aftermath, torn uniform, chimeras and an unidentified tower in the background — tower not locked as any named structure); assets/concept-art/ADA_CAPE_AGULHAS_REFERENCE_v1.png (visually confirms the Cape Agulhas, South Africa coastal setting); assets/concept-art/ADA_BASE_CAMP_REFERENCE_v1.png (Ada reading a report at an unnamed military camp — wall signage NOT locked, see cautionary note in 00_governance/CANON_STATUS.md); assets/concept-art/TALLAI_ADA_RESCUE_REFERENCE_v1.png (Tallai tends to a wounded Ada after the blast, cradling her forehead — confirms Tallai appears alongside Ada in the rescue).
In the rescue beat, Ada looks up, then faints (Kemi, 2026-06-23) — the moment she registers Tallai's call before losing consciousness again, which is what makes Quartz's carry necessary.
open_question: Does the wings/pilot-style badge in the locked reference image indicate an aviation background, or is it decorative? See 01_canon/OPEN_QUESTIONS.md #31.
dossier_status: IN PROGRESS — see 02_characters/ADA_DOSSIER.md (role facts and five locked visual references compiled, a few open fields awaiting Kemi)

name: Tallai
known_facts: Chimera care specialist — Tallai is herself a chimera who specializes in care, not a non-chimera who treats chimeras (Kemi, 2026-06-23).
Known at the bread stop in Friedmandostorp before the blast.
Explores the Garden (Era 4).
One of four Cape Wipeout survivors.
Named in the refined Nago plate's in-world Honor & Origin line as one of those who carried Nago.

Tends to a wounded Ada after the blast, cradling her forehead (Kemi-approved, 2026-06-23). Locked visual reference: assets/concept-art/TALLAI_ADA_RESCUE_REFERENCE_v1.png — pale scaled, reptilian skin; a frilled crest along the head; a clawed/webbed hand; a white care-coat/robe bearing a patch with text too small/AI-rendered to transcribe with confidence (not treated as canon text).
dossier_status: IN PROGRESS — see 02_characters/TALLAI_DOSSIER.md (role facts and locked visual reference compiled, open fields awaiting Kemi)

name: Q
known_facts: Detects — scout/sensing role ("Q detects. Quartz carries.").
One of four Cape Wipeout survivors.
Named in the refined Nago plate's in-world Honor & Origin line as one of those who carried Nago.

Appears in the Friedmandostorp rescue animatic's caption sequence (March 19, 2226): "Talla calls. Q questions the risk. Quartz moves to carry her." — the only narrative beat on record involving Q directly. See 01_canon/VISUAL_CANON_REGISTRY.md.
open_question: What does Q hear? Logged as a draft tiny question in 00_governance/TINY_QUESTIONS_PROTOCOL.md, not yet formally asked.
dossier_status: IN PROGRESS — see 02_characters/Q_DOSSIER.md (role facts and the rescue-animatic beat compiled, open fields awaiting Kemi)

name: Quartz
known_facts: Carries — load-bearer / rescue anchor ("Q detects. Quartz carries.").
One of four Cape Wipeout survivors.
Not named in the refined Nago plate's in-world Honor & Origin line, which credits Tallai, Ada, Q, and "the people" — see open question in 01_canon/OPEN_QUESTIONS.md.

Appears in the Friedmandostorp rescue animatic's caption sequence (March 19, 2226): "Talla calls. Q questions the risk. Quartz moves to carry her." — confirms Quartz physically carries Ada during the rescue. See 01_canon/VISUAL_CANON_REGISTRY.md.
open_question: What does Quartz refuse to drop? Logged as a draft tiny question in 00_governance/TINY_QUESTIONS_PROTOCOL.md, not yet formally asked.
dossier_status: IN PROGRESS — see 02_characters/QUARTZ_DOSSIER.md (role facts and the rescue-animatic beat compiled, open fields awaiting Kemi)

name: Kassey
known_facts: Ada's lover — a man, a separate person from Ada (Kemi, 2026-06-23).
Gave Ada the necklace she carries — a simple silver chain with a small, solid heart pendant (Kemi, 2026-06-23).
Alive through Cape Wipeout (Kemi, 2026-06-23) — not the figure listed KIA; that is Ada's record.

Sent by the Military Industrial Complex (MIC), with Ada, to execute the Cape Wipeout blast that obliterates the facility (Kemi, 2026-06-23). Elaborates the locked fact that the MIC destroys the facility.

His name "Kassey" burns across Ada's torn military record in the Friedmandostorp rescue animatic, in a different, glowing script (March 19, 2226). The record itself is Ada's; its CLEARANCE DENIED / KIA stamps and Chimera Survivor / Scientist / Empath tags describe Ada, not Kassey.
Canonical written form: Kassey (visual source of truth); KC is the short form.
open_question: Appearance, his standing role beyond the blast mission, whether he and Ada acted willingly or under coercion, and what becomes of him after the blast are all open and not invented. See 02_characters/KASSEY_DOSSIER.md and 01_canon/OPEN_QUESTIONS.md #30.
